SELECT id, sys.epoch(ts) FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER () AS id, ts FROM more_timestamps) AS subquery;
SELECT sys.epoch(ts) * 1000 AS milliseconds FROM timestamps;
SELECT sys.epoch(ts) AS seconds_since_epoch FROM (SELECT ts FROM nested_timestamps) AS inner_query;
CREATE TABLE orders (id INT, created_at TIMESTAMP);
SELECT o.id, sys.epoch(o.created_at) FROM orders o WHERE sys.epoch(o.created_at) > 0;
SELECT CASE WHEN sys.epoch(ts) < 0 THEN 'Before Epoch' ELSE 'After Epoch' END AS time_status FROM timestamps;
SELECT MAX(sys.epoch(ts)) AS max_epoch FROM more_timestamps;
